001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
005import androidx.room.Entity;
006import androidx.room.Index;
007import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
008import java.time.Instant;
009
010@Entity(
011    tableName = "user",
012    indices = {
013        @Index(value = "username", unique = true),
014        @Index(value = "email", unique = true)
015    }
016)
017public class User {
018
019  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
020  @ColumnInfo(name = "user_id")
021  private long id;
022
023  @NonNull
024  @ColumnInfo(name = "username")
025  private String username = "";
026
027  @NonNull
028  @ColumnInfo(name = "email")
029  private String email = "";
030
031  @NonNull
032  @ColumnInfo(name = "oauth_key")
033  private String oauthKey = "";
034
035  @ColumnInfo(name = "default_canvas_width")
036  private int defaultCanvasWidth;
037
038  @ColumnInfo(name = "default_canvas_height")
039  private int defaultCanvasHeight;
040
041  @ColumnInfo(name = "theme_preference")
042  private String themePreference;
043
044  @ColumnInfo(name = "grid_visibility")
045  private boolean gridVisibility;
046
047  @ColumnInfo(name = "zoom_sensitivity")
048  private float zoomSensitivity;
049
050  @NonNull
051  @ColumnInfo(name = "created_at")
052  private Instant createdAt = Instant.now();
053
054  @ColumnInfo(name = "last_login")
055  private Instant lastLogin;
056
057  public long getId() {
058    return id;
059  }
060
061  public void setId(long id) {
062    this.id = id;
063  }
064
065  @NonNull
066  public String getUsername() {
067    return username;
068  }
069
070  public void setUsername(@NonNull String username) {
071    this.username = username;
072  }
073
074  @NonNull
075  public String getEmail() {
076    return email;
077  }
078
079  public void setEmail(@NonNull String email) {
080    this.email = email;
081  }
082
083  @NonNull
084  public String getOauthKey() {
085    return oauthKey;
086  }
087
088  public void setOauthKey(@NonNull String oauthKey) {
089    this.oauthKey = oauthKey;
090  }
091
092  public int getDefaultCanvasWidth() {
093    return defaultCanvasWidth;
094  }
095
096  public void setDefaultCanvasWidth(int defaultCanvasWidth) {
097    this.defaultCanvasWidth = defaultCanvasWidth;
098  }
099
100  public int getDefaultCanvasHeight() {
101    return defaultCanvasHeight;
102  }
103
104  public void setDefaultCanvasHeight(int defaultCanvasHeight) {
105    this.defaultCanvasHeight = defaultCanvasHeight;
106  }
107
108  public String getThemePreference() {
109    return themePreference;
110  }
111
112  public void setThemePreference(String themePreference) {
113    this.themePreference = themePreference;
114  }
115
116  public boolean isGridVisibility() {
117    return gridVisibility;
118  }
119
120  public void setGridVisibility(boolean gridVisibility) {
121    this.gridVisibility = gridVisibility;
122  }
123
124  public float getZoomSensitivity() {
125    return zoomSensitivity;
126  }
127
128  public void setZoomSensitivity(float zoomSensitivity) {
129    this.zoomSensitivity = zoomSensitivity;
130  }
131
132  @NonNull
133  public Instant getCreatedAt() {
134    return createdAt;
135  }
136
137  public void setCreatedAt(@NonNull Instant createdAt) {
138    this.createdAt = createdAt;
139  }
140
141  public Instant getLastLogin() {
142    return lastLogin;
143  }
144
145  public void setLastLogin(Instant lastLogin) {
146    this.lastLogin = lastLogin;
147  }
148}
